HLA-A*01:01.note: Fixed dataset didn't reproduce v2 success (88.9%). Training variance remains an issue — likely due to MHCflurry labeling inconsistency or small benchmark (18 positives).

HLA-B*44:03.note: All 5 epitopes found at any threshold. F1 mathematically capped at ~0.63 because only 5 benchmark positives — even 6 FPs kills precision. Need FP<=1 for F1>=0.85. Benchmark too small for reliable F1.

HLA-A*03:01.note: Not retried. Previous best 70.6% sens. Likely benchmark curation or motif specification issues.

conclusion: 2/5 alleles pass (A*02:01, B*07:02). B*44:03 limited by benchmark size (5 positives). A*01:01 limited by training reproducibility. A*03:01 needs investigation.
